---
title: "swim data vignette"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{swim_data_vignette}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(SwimDataAnalysis)
```

This package is to analyze a swimmer's data from [swimcloud.com](swimcloud.com). The functions are tested on data that has been copy-pasted from the Times page of a swimmer's swimcloud page for a single event.

# Examples:

## cleanData
used to make a column with time series and coerce the date into a date type
```{r}
#| eval: false
cleanData(twohundred_fly)

```

## filter_year
used to filter for all the swims in one year (not season)
```{r}
#| eval: false
filter_year(twohundred_fly, 2025)
```

## find_meet
used to find the times from a meet, regardless of year
```{r}
#| eval: false
find_meet("Speedo Sectionals - Providence")
```

##plotProgress
used to plot the progression across the years
```{r}
#| eval: false
plotProgress(iris)
```
